title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist is an AI system that automates medical discoveries by identifying novel treatments for diseases like cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. It uses a self-ranking mechanism to evaluate hypotheses and has demonstrated capabilities matching or exceeding human expert performance in discovering drug combinations and genetic connections.
